faqs.question: How much do classes cost?
faqs.answer: The annual contribution is $210 per class for the year. Classes are heavily subsidised by the Ministry of Education. Instrument hire is additional: violins $80/year, cellos $100/year. Each session is 30 minutes long.

faqs.question: When and where are classes held?
faqs.answer: All classes are on Saturday mornings at Dyer Street School, 9 Dyer Street, Lower Hutt, between 8:30am and 12:30pm. Each class is 30 minutes long.

faqs.question: What age does my child need to be?
faqs.answer: Most instrument classes start at age 7. Music Basics is for ages 5–7. Recorder & Ukulele starts at 6.5, trumpet at 8+, and flute at around 8+.

faqs.question: Does my child need their own instrument?
faqs.answer: Students are expected to have access to an instrument at home and bring it to class each week. Gallery Music Centre has violins available for hire ($80/year) and cellos ($100/year). Tutors can advise on purchasing instruments.

faqs.question: How are class placements decided?
faqs.answer: Placements are determined by tutors and the Gallery Coordinator. Priority goes to students advancing from our pre-instrumental programme, then to siblings of existing students and families from Dyer Street School.

faqs.question: What about music books and materials?
faqs.answer: Tutor books are chosen by each tutor and are usually available from them directly or from local music stores. This is an additional cost beyond the class contribution.

faqs.question: Is there a waitlist?
faqs.answer: Some classes (especially keyboard and guitar) have significant waitlists. Please contact us at administration@gallerymusic.org to be added to a waitlist.

faqs.question: Can my child learn more than one instrument?
faqs.answer: Students wishing to learn more than one instrument will be placed in additional classes if spaces are available.

faqs.question: What is the annual concert?
faqs.answer: Gallery holds an annual concert (usually in Term 3) where students perform for family and friends. It’s a highlight of the year and a wonderful chance to celebrate the progress every student has made.

faqs.question: How do I enrol?
faqs.answer: Visit our enrolment page at enrol.html or contact us at administration@gallerymusic.org if you have more questions.
